title: Maximising Organic Production Systems (MOPS)
subtitle: Irish organic farming Operational Group improves collective competitiveness of agri-food firms
description: The report describes how the MOPS Operational Group in Ireland enhanced competitiveness of organic horticultural producers by fostering collaboration and optimising production practices. It reviews on-farm trials, data-driven crop planning, and farm-to-farm trade initiatives that increased supply continuity and market development nationwide.
